channel.title: HARD TIMES
channel.description: Long-form conversations about contact with reality. Not teaching. No resolution. No moral packaging. Just two people talking about what happens when the body or the plan stops, and you have to decide what comes after.
channel.itunes:author: Tanwa & Jean

item.title: HARD TIMES: What Comes After
item.description: Two people who bonded through suffering talk about why we avoid hard things — and what happens when we stop. Jean quit corporate for fitness. Tanwa can't stop signing up for races that scare him. No lessons. No resolution. Just the conversation.
